message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam participantStyle rectangle

participant "管理员" as Admin
participant "教师管理" as TeacherMgr
participant "控制层" as Controller
participant "业务层" as Business
participant "持久层" as Persistence

Admin -> TeacherMgr : 添加请求
TeacherMgr -> Controller : 输入相关信息，添加请求
Controller -> Business : 相关信息，请求登录
Business -> Persistence : 相关信息，添加请求
Persistence -> Persistence : 根据相关信息添加
Persistence -->> Business : 返回添加对象
Business -->> Controller : 返回添加对象
Controller -->> TeacherMgr : 添加成功

@enduml
```
